props.name: lineColor
props.description: Defines the color of the wave lines drawn on the canvas.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Sets the background color of the waves container.

props.name: waveSpeedX
props.description: Horizontal speed factor for the wave animation.

props.name: waveSpeedY
props.description: Vertical speed factor for the wave animation.

props.name: xGap
props.description: Horizontal gap between individual wave lines.

props.name: yGap
props.description: Vertical gap between points on each wave line.

props.name: friction
props.description: Controls how quickly the cursor effect slows down.

props.name: tension
props.description: Determines the 'springiness' of the cursor effect on points.

props.name: maxCursorMove
props.description: Limits how far each point can shift due to cursor movement.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles applied to the container element.

props.name: className
props.description: Custom class name(s) applied to the container element.
